calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Yerba Buena Commons Associates, Inc. is present. Represented by Mitchell Brown.
Attorney Clinton Woods appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Valerie Chounet is present.
Attorney Mohammad Walizadeh representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Steve Collier, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JUL-16-2012 is vacated.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Continued To Jul-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Continued To Jul-12-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
